nodes.label: graphify
nodes.rationale: Project knowledge graph tooling with god nodes, community structure, and cross-file relationships; primary interface for codebase exploration before raw grep or file browsing.

nodes.label: graphify query
nodes.rationale: First step for codebase questions when graph.json exists; returns a scoped subgraph much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md or raw grep output.

nodes.label: graphify path
nodes.rationale: Resolves dependency or relationship paths between two symbols in the knowledge graph.

nodes.label: graphify explain
nodes.rationale: Returns focused concepts and related nodes for a named concept when query/path are insufficient.

nodes.label: graphify update
nodes.rationale: Run after modifying code to keep the graph current; AST-only extraction with no API cost.

nodes.label: Graphify-First Codebase Exploration Workflow
nodes.rationale: Prefer graphify query/path/explain and wiki index over raw source browsing; reserve GRAPH_REPORT.md for broad architecture review only when scoped tools lack context.

nodes.label: Next.js Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: This project's Next.js version differs from training data; APIs, conventions, and file structure may all differ. Agents must read internal docs and heed deprecation notices before writing code.
